name: Super Smash Bros RPG
description:
"Everyone is here! Including you!" You have been invited to be a newest fighter in Super Smash Bros, you'll get to fight alongside some of the greatest fighters in history! Make friends with your favorite brawlers, duel it out in the Smash Bros Arena or just chill in the Smash HQ hub. It's all up to you!

\-{Make sure to review and leave your thoughts or suggestions for more bots! Criticism helps me grow to learn more.}-/
creator: Luna_Thatcher17
